description: CI regenerates the CRDs and dist/ that a version bump implies, and pushes them back onto the Renovate branch as github-actions[bot] (see .github/workflows/ci.yaml). gitIgnoredAuthors keeps Renovate from treating that commit as a third-party modification, which would otherwise block both rebasing and automerge. Automerge is platform-native (the default): the `main` ruleset requires the CI check, which is both what makes auto-merge armable at all and what holds the merge until the regenerated head commit is green.

packageRules.description: package.json/bun.lock dependency bumps are handled manually via `mise run upgrade` (bun update) per CLAUDE.md's 'confirm before adding dependencies' policy - don't have Renovate open PRs for them. Must name `bun`, not just `npm`: because bun.lock exists, the bun manager claims package.json and the npm manager never sees it, so matching npm alone silently matched nothing.

Chart/CRD version bumps (the custom.regex managers below) are fully self-completing once CI pushes the regenerated CRDs + dist/, and CI synthesizes and validates the exact manifests Argo will apply. Let minor/patch automerge on green; majors still get regenerated onto the branch by CI, but wait for a human to actually look at the CRD diff before Argo applies it.

The velero CLI renders its own CRDs, so mise.toml's pin and tools/sources.ts' pin must match -- sources.ts hard-fails the render otherwise. Renovate sees them through two managers (mise, custom.regex) under two depNames, which would mean two PRs that each fail CI alone and can only go green once both land. Group them so they always move as one. Deliberately not scoped to minor/patch: a major has to stay grouped too.
Mirror of the custom.regex automerge rule above, for the mise-managed half of the grouped velero PR -- a grouped branch only automerges if every dependency in it is allowed to.

customManagers.description: Bump literal versions pinned in tools/sources.ts (velero, and the disabled cnpg/kured/sealed-secrets/system-upgrade-controller placeholders), each annotated with a `// renovate: datasource=... depName=...` comment directly above the `value` field.

Bump the app-const chart/release versions in apps/cert-manager/app.ts and apps/metrics/app.ts that tools/sources.ts derives its CRD versions from (VersionSource kind 'app-const'). Annotated the same way as the literal versions in tools/sources.ts.
